'''Harch''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
He was the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Major/Legends|major]] who served on board the [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] as an engineering officer in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. He coordinated repairs on the ''Chimaera'' after an attack from [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vilim Disra|Disra's]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] near [[Pesitiin]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
